title: Savory Egyptian Lamb Kidney Stir-fry
description: This lazy Sunday dish features tender lamb kidneys and dumplings in a flavorful sauce, perfect for a low-carb meal.

ingredients.name: dumplings
ingredients.notes: any type, cooked but not fried

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.notes: grated fresh or finely chopped dried

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion, garlic, ginger, and red pepper flakes. Stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant but not browned.
Add lamb kidneys to the wok along with salt and pepper. Stir-fry for another 3 minutes.
Pour in tomato paste and mix well. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly.
Fold dumplings into the sauce, reduce heat to medium, and let cook for about 5 more minutes.
Serve hot with rice or as a side dish.
